summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new email/password authentication system for U-CAN pet services app. All 15 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend login/register pages work correctly with proper error handling.

issues: 'Iniciar Sesión' and 'Registrarse' buttons in navbar redirect to Google Auth instead of /login page. Users must navigate to /login directly to use email/password login. This may be intentional UX decision to keep Google as primary auth method.

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/register - register with valid email/password returns user + JWT token (200)
Backend: POST /api/auth/register - hashed_password NOT returned in response (security verified)
Backend: POST /api/auth/register - duplicate email returns 400 with Spanish error
Backend: POST /api/auth/register - short password (<6 chars) returns 400 with Spanish error
Backend: POST /api/auth/register - missing fields return 422
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - valid credentials return user + JWT token (200)
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - hashed_password NOT returned in response (security verified)
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - wrong password returns 401 with Spanish error
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - nonexistent email returns 401
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - missing fields return 422
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - valid JWT token returns user data (200)
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - no token returns 401
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - invalid token returns 401
Backend: POST /api/auth/logout - returns success message (200)
Backend: Full E2E flow: register -> login -> get me works correctly
Frontend: Login page loads with email/password form + Google button
Frontend: Login page has data-testid attributes for all form elements
Frontend: Register page loads with name, email, password, confirm password fields
Frontend: Register page has Google register button
Frontend: Navigation between /login and /register pages works
Frontend: Email/password registration redirects to /dashboard on success
Frontend: Email/password login redirects to /dashboard on success
Frontend: Short password shows toast error 'La contraseña debe tener al menos 6 caracteres'
Frontend: Wrong password shows toast error 'Correo o contraseña incorrectos'
critical_code_review_comments: Navbar login/register buttons go to Google Auth - users must navigate to /login directly for email login. Consider adding link to /login page or updating navbar buttons to go to /login with Google option there.
seed_data_creation: Test users created during API testing with TEST_ prefix emails. Provided test user testflow@ucan.cl created and verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email/password auth fully working: 1) POST /api/auth/register creates user with JWT, 2) POST /api/auth/login authenticates with JWT, 3) GET /api/auth/me verifies JWT token, 4) POST /api/auth/logout works for both session and JWT users, 5) Frontend Login.jsx and Register.jsx pages have proper form handling with Spanish error messages, 6) hashed_password is properly excluded from all API responses, 7) Test user testflow@ucan.cl with password test123456 available for future testing.
